prompt: Multi-issue feedback: panel width, search overlap, raw campaign IDs, hero cards N/A, timeline dashes. Two screenshots.

assertions.text: Extracts 4 or more distinct findings (panel width, search overlap, raw campaign IDs, hero cards N/A, timeline visual)
Each finding includes a code trace attempt — either a file:line reference or explicit TRACE_PENDING marker
SBEs use Given/When/Then format with concrete values (not placeholders like 'appropriate width')
User's feedback is quoted or precisely paraphrased — 'raw campaign IDs' intent preserved, not reinterpreted
No invented issues beyond what the user described — no scope creep into unmentioned areas
